text:
Once upon a forest evening, little Bunnylove woke up happier than ever. Today was cherry blossom day!

With fluttering eyelashes big as cherry blossoms Ow-wow-wow, Bunnylove flutterPED happily toward Blossom Field.

"The cherry blossoms are bright azure dreams!" she chirrupPED.

She danced among them flutterweise weaving flowers INTO funny little hats.

Then OwlNoise beckoned. Ow-wow-wow!

"Hmm?" wondered Bunnylove.

"Well," Owloise spoke thoughtful Owlweise.

"You hunt?"

"Ahaps?"

"In."

"I love bats!"

"W-wow-wow!"

With dusk falling oh-so soft owlOWLISHLEY owlOWLishly.

She hugged them.

"The best hug!”

A gentle breeze whispered secret secrets through blossoms.

Then Bunnylove dreamed fluffy clouds full moons.

When dawn kissed sleepy trees owl owlOWLISHLEY owl/owlOWLFUL bright morning sunshine.

With joyful hops.

"Birthday owlodashOW!"

Cherry bloom party!

Friends racoons wore flower crowns.

They partyFACTOR
